stemHtml:
Which of the following statements is an interpretation of the METAR ?

00000KT 0200 R14/0800U R16/P1500U FZFG VV001 M03/M03 Q1022 BECMG 0800=

options.a: Visibility 200 feet, RVR for runway 16 is more than 1500 metres, vertical visibility 100 feet, fog with hoar frost
options.b: Visibility for runway 14 is 800 metres, fog with hoar frost, RVR for runway 16 more than 1500 metres
options.c: RVR for runway 14 is 800 metres, vertical visibility 100 feet, calm, visibility improving to 800 metres in the next 2 hours
options.d: Visibility 200 metres, RVR for runway 16 is 1500 metres, temperature -3°C, vertical visibility 100 metres.
